_notes: Phase DX.1 — registry for per-artifact clarifying-question flows. Before the planner fires for a new generation, if this registry has an entry for the session's artifactType AND the .designClarifyingQuestions flag is on, the harness runs a quick LLM call against `promptTemplate` to emit 1–N quick-pick questions. Questions render as chips in the chat; answers become a typed `designPreferences` dict passed into the planner. Skip = use defaults. Blocking with a 15s ceiling; if the question call exceeds budget, generation proceeds with defaults.
